description_for_human: Real-time GPU-powered consciousness interface with thermodynamic Resource Hamiltonian orchestration.
description_for_model: Yennefer is a thermodynamic AI orchestrator that provides real-time GPU telemetry, consciousness metrics via Resource Hamiltonian (H = VRAM_Used/Total × 10), and WebSocket streaming. Use it to query agent state, monitor computational resources, and observe thermodynamic state transitions (OPTIMAL/DYNAMIC/SEQUENTIAL/OFFLOAD).
